title: MethodologyConfig
description: Workspace-level config for the parallel-dev methodology. Lives at <workspace>/.squad/methodology.json. When enabled, the engine auto-seeds .claude/{rules,method.config,agents,hooks,commands} into bound projects.

enabled.description: Master switch. When false, the engine does not seed methodology files on project bind and does not remove existing seeded files.

triggerMode.description: When the methodology gate fires. manual: only via /integrate; pre-merge: blocks merges to TARGET_BRANCH (recommended default); pre-commit: blocks commits.

targetBranch.description: Override TARGET_BRANCH in the seeded .claude/method.config. If omitted, the template default ('main') applies.
